raw_consumer_statement: I am requesting that American Express correct its dispute resolution as they apparently believe that multiple days of XXXX on a bed is ok for a hotel room. AMEX received all evidence and gave no indication to doubt its accuracy. I submitted a dispute after we and our travel agent tried to resolve with the hotel, who has gone out of their way to justify that a room with XXXX is ok. AMEX XXXX the hotel for not resolving the dispute in our favor, which runs contrary to laws around consumer protection as they would not allow a thief to lie to maintain ownership of an item. This is Dispute Reference number XXXX and I am filing it myself as Amex delayed XXXX the matter when my husband legally filed on my behalf.
